proposal1.heroHeadline: 30acres is hemorrhaging over 500 hours a year on manual proposals. Here's how to stop the bleed.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Currently, crafting proposals is a tedious task. With our system, generate them in just 47 seconds, tailored to your ecommerce expertise.
proposal1.problemsIntro: Each of these issues represents a continuous drain on your resources.

problems.title: Wasted Hours
problems.description: Manual proposals consume over 500 hours annually. Every hour spent on proposals is an hour not spent enhancing your ecommerce solutions.

problems.title: Missed Deals
problems.description: Delayed proposals mean missed opportunities. Every delayed response risks losing a potential client to a competitor.

problems.title: Inconsistent Branding
problems.description: Manually created proposals often lack brand consistency. This inconsistency can confuse clients and weaken your brand image.

problems.title: High Labor Costs
problems.description: Paying skilled developers to create proposals is costly. These funds could be better spent on innovation or client engagement.

problems.title: Proposal Errors
problems.description: Human errors in proposals can lead to misunderstandings and lost deals. Errors cost credibility and trust in your holistic services.

problems.title: Client Frustration
problems.description: Slow proposal turnaround frustrates clients. Frustrated clients are less likely to engage your services, impacting your bottom line.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI system replaces every inefficient step described above.

solutions.title: Automated Generation
solutions.description: Currently, proposals require hours of manual labor. Our system creates them in 47 seconds, freeing your team for more strategic tasks.

solutions.title: Brand Consistency
solutions.description: Inconsistent proposals weaken your brand. Our system ensures each proposal is on-brand, strengthening your professional image.

solutions.title: Real-Time Tracking
solutions.description: Without tracking, you miss crucial client interactions. Our system includes tracking to refine your approach and close deals faster.

solutions.title: Error-Free Proposals
solutions.description: Manual proposals risk costly errors. Our AI system ensures accuracy, preserving your credibility and client trust.

solutions.title: Instant Client Insights
solutions.description: Gathering client data is time-consuming. Our system scrapes and analyzes client websites instantly, arming you with valuable insights.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for 30acres's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for 30acres around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for 30acres.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Boost Acme Corp's Digital Efficiency with 30acres's Integrated IT Solutions
proposal2.heroSubheadline: We'll enhance your IT infrastructure and streamline operations to boost productivity and reduce costs.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is currently facing losses due to inefficiencies and missed opportunities.

problems.title: High Operational Costs
problems.description: Inefficient IT processes are costing Acme Corp approximately $50,000 monthly. These costs could be redirected towards growth initiatives.

problems.title: Data Security Vulnerabilities
problems.description: Data breaches have the potential to cost Acme Corp up to $100,000 in recovery and reputation damage annually. Secure your data now.

problems.title: Slow IT Response Times
problems.description: Delayed IT responses lead to an estimated loss of 100 productivity hours monthly, affecting your team's output and morale.

problems.title: Poor User Experience
problems.description: Every customer frustrated due to poor UX is a lost sale. This could mean a $500,000 annual revenue loss for Acme Corp.

problems.title: Outdated Technology
problems.description: Relying on outdated technology reduces efficiency, causing a 20% decline in overall productivity annually.

problems.title: Limited Scalability
problems.description: Your current IT setup limits expansion, impacting potential revenue growth by 30% annually.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Our tailored solutions will effectively address these challenges and transform your business operations.

solutions.title: Comprehensive IT Security
solutions.description: Protects your data from breaches and ensures compliance. We safeguard your business integrity.

solutions.title: Infrastructure Optimization
solutions.description: Streamlines your operations to reduce costs and improve efficiency. Less downtime, more productivity.

solutions.title: Data-Driven Insights
solutions.description: Transforms your data into actionable insights for strategic decision-making. Stay ahead with informed choices.

solutions.title: Scalable IT Solutions
solutions.description: Ensures your IT infrastructure grows with you, supporting expansion and innovation. Future-proof your business.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: At 30acres, our approach is technical yet warm, focusing on real results.

whyUsCards.title: Proven Expertise
whyUsCards.description: Our team brings years of experience in transforming IT landscapes. We've got the know-how you need.

whyUsCards.title: Customized Solutions
whyUsCards.description: We tailor our services to fit your unique needs, ensuring maximum impact and efficiency.

whyUsCards.title: Client-Centric Approach
whyUsCards.description: We prioritize your goals and work closely with you to achieve them. Your success is our success.

whyUsCards.title: Result-Oriented
whyUsCards.description: We focus on delivering measurable outcomes that drive your business forward.

proposal2.teamIntro: Our team combines expertise with a passion for delivering results.

team.name: Paul Fisher
team.bio: Paul leads our strategy and client relationships, ensuring every project aligns with client goals. His experience drives our success.

process.title: Discovery and Planning

serviceList: What we’re all about, all under one roof

lead.company_description:
30Acres is an integrated commerce agency with deep experience in ecommerce development and growth. We build bespoke online experiences for ambitious brands that care about their customers. We do this by immersing ourselves in your world, and by placing our feet in the shoes of your audience. It's this kind of empathy that drives us. It's how we're built. It's how we work. It's what makes us 30Acres. 

We believe doing business online is about so much more than marketing, technology and data. We place people at the very core of everything we do. Sure, we're an experienced bunch, but to truly succeed in the ever-evolving and fragmenting world of digital commerce, it takes a people-focused group of technicians, marketers and experience creators.

30Acres is a Shopify Plus Partner.

We're Good People.

We are proud to be an equal opportunity employer and we seriously value diversity in our company. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, colour, nationality, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, or disability status. We're carbon neutral and we're committed to giving back to our community and the environment.
